name: Hybrid coupling with operator inference and the overlapping Schwarz alternating method
summary: arXiv:2511.20687v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This paper presents a novel hybrid approach for coupling subdomain-local non-intrusive Operator Inference (OpInf) reduced order models (ROM...
description: arXiv:2511.20687v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This paper presents a novel hybrid approach for coupling subdomain-local non-intrusive Operator Inference (OpInf) reduced order models (ROMs) with each other and with subdomain-local high-fidelity full order models (FOMs) with using the overlapping Schwarz alternating method (O-SAM). The proposed methodology addresses significant challen...
author: Irina Tezaur, Eric Parish, Anthony Gruber, Ian Moore, Christopher Wentland, Alejandro Mota
